title: Horsepower to Kilowatt Converter
description: Industrial-grade conversion tool with efficiency analysis, loss drivers, and actionable recommendations based on ISO 80000-4 and IEC 60034 standards.

inputs.label: Horsepower (HP)
inputs.businessContext: Mechanical power rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mechanical power rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor veya makinenin mekanik güç değeri. Endüstriyel motorlar için tipik aralık: 0,5–5000 hp.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mechanische Nennleistung des Motors oder Antriebs. Typischer Bereich für Industriemotoren: 0,5–5000 PS.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance mécanique nominale du moteur. Plage typique pour les moteurs industriels : 0,5–5000 hp.
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación de potencia mecánica del motor o máquina. Rango típico para motores industriales: 0.5–5000 hp.

inputs.label: Horsepower Type
inputs.businessContext: Different horsepower definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different horsepower definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Farklı beygir gücü tanımları dönüşüm faktörünü etkiler. Mekanik HP = 745,7 W, Metrik HP = 735,5 W, Elektrik HP = 746 W.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verschiedene PS-Definitionen beeinflussen den Umrechnungsfaktor. Mechanische PS = 745,7 W, metrische PS = 735,5 W, elektrische PS = 746 W.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différentes définitions de la puissance affectent le facteur de conversion. Puissance mécanique = 745,7 W, Puissance métrique = 735,5 W, Puissance électrique = 746 W.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferentes definiciones de caballo de fuerza afectan el factor de conversión. HP mecánico = 745.7 W, HP métrico = 735.5 W, HP eléctrico = 746 W.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the motor at rated load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the motor at rated load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motorun nominal yükteki verimliliği. Tipik IE3 motorlar: %90–95, IE4: %95–97.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Motors bei Nennlast. Typische IE3-Motoren: 90–95 %, IE4: 95–97 %.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du moteur à charge nominale. Moteurs IE3 typiques : 90–95 %, IE4 : 95–97 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del motor a carga nominal. Motores IE3 típicos: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of rated load at which the motor operates. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of rated load at which the motor operates. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motorun çalıştığı nominal yük yüzdesi. Düşük yükte çalışan motorlar verimliliği azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Nennlast, mit der der Motor arbeitet. Unterlastete Motoren verringern den Wirkungsgrad.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la charge nominale auquel le moteur fonctionne. Les moteurs sous-chargés réduisent le rendement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de carga nominal al que opera el motor. Motores subcargados reducen la eficiencia.

inputs.label: Power Factor
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek gücün görünür güce oranı. Tipik endüstriyel motorlar: 0,8–0,95 geri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von Wirkleistung zu Scheinleistung. Typische Industriemotoren: 0,8–0,95 nacheilend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport de la puissance réelle à la puissance apparente. Moteurs industriels typiques : 0,8–0,95 en retard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre potencia real y aparente. Motores industriales típicos: 0.8–0.95 en retraso.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual runtime for energy cost calculations. Common values: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual runtime for energy cost calculations. Common values: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji maliyeti hesaplamaları için yıllık çalışma süresi. Yaygın değerler: 2000 (tek vardiya), 4000 (iki vardiya), 8000 (sürekli).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Betriebszeit für Energiekostenberechnungen. Übliche Werte: 2000 (Einschichtbetrieb), 4000 (Zweischichtbetrieb), 8000 (Dauerbetrieb).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de fonctionnement annuel pour les calculs de coût énergétique. Valeurs courantes : 2000 (un quart), 4000 (deux quarts), 8000 (continu).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de funcionamiento anual para cálculos de coste energético. Valores comunes: 2000 (turno único), 4000 (dos turnos), 8000 (continuo).

inputs.label: Electricity Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average industrial electricity rate. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average industrial electricity rate. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalama endüstriyel elektrik tarifesi. Çoğu bölgede aralık: $0,05–$0,30.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Industriestrompreis. Bereich: 0,05–0,30 $ in den meisten Regionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tarif moyen de l'électricité industrielle. Plage : 0,05–0,30 $ dans la plupart des régions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa eléctrica industrial promedio. Rango: $0.05–$0.30 en la mayoría de regiones.

rules.message: High efficiency motors typically have power factor >= 0.8. Verify input values.
Motor operating below 50% load. Efficiency may drop significantly. Consider downsizing.
Metric HP values above 5000 are rare. Confirm input.

thresholds.message: Motor efficiency below 80% – consider replacement with IE3/IE4 motor.
Power factor below 0.7 – potential penalty charges. Consider power factor correction.
Annual energy cost exceeds $50,000 – investigate energy savings opportunities.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
